auto_learn_private_ranges_enabled.description: Enables automatic learning of private IP ranges

base_policy_id.description: Specifies the ID of the base policy to associate with the resource

dns.description: Configures DNS settings, including proxy and server options

explicit_proxy.description: Defines explicit proxy settings like PAC file, ports, and enablement
explicit_proxy.type: list(object({enable_pac_file: optional(bool),enabled: optional(bool),http_port: optional(number),https_port: optional(number),pac_file: optional(string),pac_file_port: optional(number)}))

identity.description: Defines identity configuration including principal and tenant IDs

insights.description: Configures insights for logging and analytics with retention settings
insights.type: list(object({default_log_analytics_workspace_id: string,enabled: bool,retention_in_days: optional(number),log_analytics_workspace: list(object({firewall_location: string,id: string}))}))

intrusion_detection.description: Manages intrusion detection with modes, ranges, and bypass rules
intrusion_detection.type: list(object({mode: optional(string),private_ranges: optional(list(string)),signature_overrides: list(object({id: optional(string),state: optional(string)})),traffic_bypass: list(object({description: optional(string),destination_addresses: optional(list(string)),destination_ip_groups: optional(list(string)),destination_ports: optional(list(string)),name: string,protocol: string,source_addresses: optional(list(string)),source_ip_groups: optional(list(string))}))}))

name.description: Specifies the name of the resource (required)

private_ip_ranges.description: Lists private IP ranges in CIDR notation

sku.description: Defines the SKU for the resource (e.g., standard, premium)

tags.description: Defines tags for resource categorization and billing

threat_intelligence_allowlist.description: Specifies IPs and FQDNs to exclude from threat intelligence checks

threat_intelligence_mode.description: Sets the mode for threat intelligence (e.g., alert, deny)

timeouts.description: Configures operation timeouts for create, read, update, and delete

tls_certificate.description: Specifies TLS certificates with Key Vault secret IDs and names

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
